components.name: accordion
components.description: Disclosure accordion (multi/single open). ARIA expanded/controls/labelledby/region, keyboard nav (Enter/Space/Arrow), animated max-height.

components.name: Alert
components.description: Inline alert/notice (icon, body, title, desc). Color variants, compact, dismissible.

components.name: auto-disable
components.description: Disables a button on click and adds is-loading + aria-busy. Prevents duplicate submits.

components.name: autocomplete
components.description: Combobox with built-in fetch (single + multi-select via data-multiple, removable inline chips), JSON {results:[...]}, AbortController, ARIA combobox/listbox, no innerHTML (anti-XSS).

components.name: aux
components.description: Delegated micro-behaviors: alert dismiss, chip remove, list selectable, copy-tab. Single document-level listener, dispatches ng:aux:copy / ng:aux:copy-error.

components.name: Avatar
components.description: Avatar (immagine/iniziali), dot/badge, ring, size system, avatar-group/stack.

components.name: back-to-top
components.description: Floating scroll-to-top button that composes .ng-btn. Options: threshold (px/%), behavior smooth/instant, anchor target, container scope, progress ring (conic), auto-hide, corners, animations, hide-on-mobile. Events ng:back-to-top:show|hide|click.

components.name: Badge
components.description: Inline labels / counters. SCSS-only (no JS). Variants: solid · outline · soft · size sm/lg (default = medium) · shape pill/quad/circle · subtle. Colors from $ng-colors (L1/L2 tokens, override via --ng-<color>-bg).

components.name: Breadcrumb
components.description: Breadcrumb with separators (arrow/chevron/dot/pipe), size, interactive, boxed, truncate.

components.name: Button
components.description: Interactive buttons. SCSS-only styling (spinner in _ng_spinner). Variants: solid · outline · soft · ghost · link · size xs/sm/md/lg · shape rect/quad/circle · hover/disabled/loading states. Colors from $ng-colors (L1/L2 tokens, override via --ng-<color>-bg).

components.name: Card
components.description: Structural card: media, head (left/right), subhead, body, section, subfoot, foot (left/center/right). Hover, compact, horizontal variants. Responsive. Overridable scoped vars. Head titles: .ng-card-head-titles block (vertical stack) + .ng-card-title / .ng-card-subtitle for the "title above, subtitle below" pattern without forcing head-left to column. Spacing model (1.3.0): single horizontal pad-x + general vertical gap-block (above/below subhead/body/subfoot); head and foot with their own padding-Y and independent inner X/Y gaps (--ng-card-{head,foot}-gap-{x,y}). Head ↔ subhead now separated: divider line below the header (--ng-card-head-border-bottom, default on) + space. Removed tokens: --ng-card-{padding,body-padding,header-padding, footer-padding,gap-foot} (absorbed by the new model).

components.name: chart
components.description: NG Chart. Tier 1 (SCSS): donut/gauge/bars/sparkline. Tier 2 (this JS): line/area/bar from data (data-values) with auto-scale, px render (round circles), hover tooltip + active point/bar, re-render on resize. Zero dependencies.

components.name: Chip
components.description: Inline chip/tag, removable variant.

components.name: Collapse
components.description: Contenitore collassabile (height gestita inline dal JS).

components.name: count
components.description: Character counter enhancer for input and textarea fields, with flexible positioning and DOM-driven initialization.

components.name: Divider
components.description: Divisore orizzontale/verticale; half/center/dashed/dotted/with-text; varianti colore.

components.name: dropdown
components.description: Dropdown menu with hover/click modes, top-layer (Popover API) positioning with auto flip/clamp, ARIA expanded, ESC close, custom events ng:dropdown:open|close.

components.name: Empty
components.description: Empty state centrato (title + text).

components.name: Footer
components.description: Page footer: column grid (auto-fit), nav, bottom bar. Variants center/right/inline. Responsive. Scoped vars.

components.name: form
components.description: Form enhancer: validation helpers, input state, API ngValidate/ngReset/ngSerialize, delegated password toggle (.ng-password-toggle in .ng-input-group, event ng:form:password-toggle).

components.name: formatter
components.description: Output formatter for [data-format]: number, currency, percent, date. Locale-aware via Intl. Public API: ng.formatter.format/refresh.

components.name: header
components.description: Responsive header. Moves [data-on-mobile] items into overlay below 768px and restores on desktop. Manages header menus with outside-click + ESC close.

components.name: Input Group
components.description: Wrapper for input + addons (icons, text, buttons) prepend/append, multi-addon, inherited sizes. Focus-within propagated to the whole group. Consistent disabled state. Reuses the --ng-input-* tokens. Pattern derived from .ng-btn-group. Password toggle: .ng-password-toggle (show/hide eye, JS in ng_form.js).

components.name: List
components.description: Lists and list-item (media/content/action), meta-content. Variants selectable/divided/bordered/flush/hover/clickable/striped/compact/horizontal/tags/tasks.

components.name: matizer
components.description: DOM sorter for [data-order-list]. Types: a-z, num, len (+rev). Public API: ng.matizer.sort(), ng.matizer.refresh().

components.name: modal
components.description: Modal/dialog with backdrop, focus trap, return-focus, ARIA dialog roles.

components.name: overlay
components.description: Drawer/offcanvas universale (left/right): ESC, click backdrop, Tab focus-trap, ARIA dialog.

components.name: Page Loader
components.description: Fullscreen loading overlay (fixed, inset:0) with blur. Variants dark and is-hidden (to hide when ready). Overridable scoped vars.

components.name: Pagination
components.description: Pagination with a stable structure (fixed slots to avoid layout shift). Page list, page-size select, page/ prev/next/first/last/ellipsis elements, active/disabled states, alignment and size variants. SCSS-only.

components.name: Panel
components.description: Structural/functional container to group content into sections (settings, dashboard, filters). Opposite of the card: flat, bordered, dense, no shadow/hover-lift. Sub: head/body/foot. Variants: brand header band (.ng-panel-<color>) · .ng-panel-flat · size sm/lg · collapsible .ng-panel-collapsible (reuses ng_toggle.js + .ng-collapse, 0 new JS). Colors from $ng-colors (L1/L2 tokens). Radius md via fallback-at-use.

components.name: popover
components.description: Anchored popover with click/hover/focus triggers, 12 placements, auto-flip, viewport clamp, portal positioning, optional modal mode with focus trap, custom events ng:popover:open|close.

components.name: Progress
components.description: Progress bar. Color variants via --ng-progress-fill.

components.name: range
components.description: Flat range slider (single + dual-thumb): dynamic colored fill, number output, marks, ARIA, vertical (CSS), opt-in ticks (.ng-range-ticks), hue/alpha colorpicker (formats hex|rgb|css-rgb|css-rgba|cmyk + copy). data-jump=step.

components.name: select-orion
components.description: Advanced select (select2-like) as an enhancement of the native <select> — separate component, no collision with the form's .ng-select. Single + multi (chip), local search, groups (optgroup), rich options (Phosphor icon + sublabel), placeholder, clear, ARIA combobox/listbox, native submit, optional sync via ng_state. No innerHTML (anti-XSS).

components.name: sidebar
components.description: Sidebar layout/drawer with submenu disclosure, ARIA expanded/hidden/controls, listener tracking, optional overlay.

components.name: Brand Signature (button + badge)
components.description: Visual signatures that distinguish NG from the Bootstrap 5 look. Applied only to .ng-btn and .ng-badge, opt-out with .ng-flat on an instance: C. Radius 3px         → "precision" silhouette, master baseline --ng-radius D. Premium padding    → typographic breathing room, each size scaled E. Microtypography    → weight 600 + tracking +.02em (no uppercase) Bar  (hover)          → animated top or bottom bar, 4 opt-in directions (.ng-btn-bar + position + direction). See below. .ng-flat              → opt-out: radius sm (5px), default padding, default typography, no bar (= BS5-like look). Token-based: 0 hardcoded hex. Imported AFTER ng_button/ng_badge in _ng_components.scss to guarantee the override.

components.name: Skeleton
components.description: Loading placeholder with shimmer. Elements line/rect/ circle, width utilities, compact variant. Container .ng-skeleton optional (vars have fallback). SCSS-only.

components.name: snackbar
components.description: Snackbar notifier with auto-dismiss timer, role=status + aria-live=polite for assistive tech.

components.name: Spinner
components.description: Circular spinner (border + rotation). Size sm/lg, center. Integration with .ng-btn / .ng-auto-disable in the is-loading state (positions spinner-right/left/top/bottom). SCSS-only.

components.name: state
components.description: State manager – dual pipeline (runtime mirror + dataset snapshot) with TTL, watch and tab sync

components.name: Steps
components.description: Steps/wizard: stili classic e bar, stati is-active/is-done, size.

components.name: table-v2
components.description: Advanced table: local/remote dataset, sort, search, filters, page-size, column toggle, row selection (delegated), sub-table/detail-row (data-table-expandable, free slot + lazy via ng:table:expand), persist via localStorage. API: reload (invalidates and re-fills the open sub-rows)/reset/getState/setPage/setLimit/search/export/expandRow/collapseRow/toggleRow/isExpanded/refreshDetails/reloadRow.

components.name: tabs
components.description: Tablist with role=tab/tablist, aria-selected/controls, keyboard nav (arrows/Home/End), DOM-driven init.

components.name: theme
components.description: Theme switch via [data-theme] on <html>, persisted in localStorage + ng:theme:change event. Theme ALWAYS explicit (no auto/OS): default light.

components.name: toggle
components.description: Toggle disclosure for collapsibles. ARIA expanded/controls, keyboard Enter/Space, optional state persistence via ng.state.

components.name: tooltip
components.description: Tooltip on hover/focus with viewport-aware positioning (auto-flip + clamp, never clipped), role=tooltip and aria-describedby on trigger. Opt-in HTML content via data-tooltip-html (trusted content only).

components.name: treeview
components.description: Expandable hierarchical tree (file-tree): nested nodes, caret toggle (icon override via data-expand-icon/data-collapse-icon), author-chosen node icon, opt-in selection (data-treeview-selectable), opt-in checkbox (data-treeview-checkable=all|leaves, tri-state folders), group titles. Events ng:treeview:expand|collapse|select|check. API expand/collapse/toggle/expandAll/collapseAll/select/check/getChecked.

components.name: ws
components.description: WebSocket singleton client: connect/emit/on with keep-alive and automatic reconnect.
